---
id: admin-create-order
title: "Admin create order"
description: "Admin creates an order on behalf of a customer. Matches user by email or creates a new account with random password (verified=false). Free tickets complete immediately. Paid tickets flip to payment_pending."
sidebar_label: "Admin create order"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/mautiket-admin-order-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Admin create order"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/events/{idOrSlug}/admin/orders"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Admin creates an order on behalf of a customer. Matches user by email or creates a new account with random password (verified=false). Free tickets complete immediately. Paid tickets flip to payment_pending.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
